brief.audience: business professionals interested in Voice AI technology
painPoints: high latency in voice AI agents
lack of network ownership affecting performance
brief.coreMessage: Voice AI agents with sub-200ms latency and owned network for superior performance

headlines: Reduce Voice AI latency to under 200ms with Telnyx’s owned network
Voice AI inference co-located with telephony for sub-200ms response times
Telnyx delivers Voice AI agents with latency below 200 milliseconds
Control latency and performance with Telnyx’s proprietary network
Voice AI under 200ms latency across 140+ countries on one platform
Sub-200ms Voice AI latency powered by Telnyx’s co-located inference
Eliminate high latency in Voice AI with Telnyx’s owned infrastructure
Telnyx Voice AI: sub-200ms latency, HIPAA/SOC2/PCI compliant
One platform for Voice AI with sub-200ms latency and global reach
Optimize Voice AI performance with Telnyx’s network and low latency
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI runs inference co-located with telephony, achieving latency under 200 milliseconds. Owning the entire network ensures consistent performance across 140+ countries without relying on resellers.

High latency in Voice AI agents disrupts user experience. Telnyx addresses this with a proprietary network and inference co-located with telephony, delivering sub-200ms response times while maintaining HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliance.

Latency above 500 milliseconds degrades Voice AI interactions. Telnyx reduces this to under 200ms by controlling network infrastructure and inference placement, enabling real-time voice processing across a single, compliant platform.

Telnyx combines network ownership with inference co-location to achieve sub-200ms latency in Voice AI agents. This approach eliminates delays caused by third-party networks, improving responsiveness in over 140 countries.

Managing multiple vendors increases latency and complexity in Voice AI. Telnyx offers a unified platform with owned infrastructure, co-located inference, and compliance certifications, delivering consistent sub-200ms latency worldwide.
